login.title: Sign in to TrustedOSS
login.subtitle: Continue to your projects and scans.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Sign up to start managing open-source risk for your team.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link if the account exists.
forgot.success: If that email is registered, we've sent a reset link. Check your inbox.

reset.title: Choose a new password
reset.subtitle: Set a new password for your account.
reset.info: Choose a password with at least 12 characters.

errors.missing_token: This reset link is invalid or incomplete. Request a new one to continue.
errors.invalid: This reset link is invalid or has already been used. Request a new one.
errors.expired: This reset link has expired. Request a new one to continue.

errors.denied: Sign-in was cancelled at the provider. Try again or use email and password.
errors.invalid_state: The sign-in session was invalid or expired. Try again.
errors.failed: We couldn't complete the sign-in with the provider. Try again.
errors.user_inactive: This account is disabled. Contact your administrator.
errors.no_organization: No organization is configured. Contact your administrator.
errors.missing_params: The sign-in callback was missing required information.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong during sign-in. Try again.

errors.password_too_short: Password must be at least 12 characters.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment.
